programme.title: The Daisy Chain
programme.desc: A grieving couple move to a remote Irish village in the wake of their baby daughter's death. They soon take in an orphaned autistic girl, only to become involved in a series of strange occurrences.

programme.title: What's Your Number?
programme.desc: A woman looks back at the past nineteen men she's had relationships with in her life and wonders if one of them might be her one true love.

programme.title: Bluebird
programme.desc: Discover how huge stars like Garth Brooks and Taylor Swift got their start while we follow up-and-coming singer-songwriters pursuing their ambitions at The Bluebird Cafe. This Nashville hot spot is a surprising landmark that's made a big impact on music history.

programme.title: A Love to Remember
programme.desc: After a year of interacting exclusively online, Tenley, an eco-conscious horticulturist, finally works up the courage to meet her online crush, Jared. When Jared doesn’t show because of a bike accident, Tenley gets mistaken for his wife at the hospital. Soon, she’s forced to keep the lie up with Jared’s entire family and his annoyingly charming best friend, Everett in order to save Jared’s company... You’ve Got Mail meets While You Were Sleeping!

programme.title: Blueprint to the Heart
programme.desc: An interior designer trying to save her TV home renovation show needs to apply her successful, upscale home renovation strategy to her blue collar carpenter by making the sweet but disheveled guy her next fixer upper project.

programme.title: The Witches of Oz
programme.desc: Dorothy Gale discovers that her best-selling novels are actually based on suppressed childhood memories of her time in Oz, and that she may be in danger of experiencing it all over again.

programme.title: A Handful of Dust
programme.desc: The wife's affair and a death in the family hasten the demise of an upper-class English marriage.

programme.title: Father's Little Dividend
programme.desc: Shortly after coming to terms with his daughter's marriage, a father faces the prospect of becoming a grandfather.

programme.title: Monte Carlo
programme.desc: Three young women vacationing in Paris, find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of them is mistaken for a British heiress.

programme.title: Down With Love
programme.desc: In 1962 New York City, love blossoms between a playboy journalist and a feminist advice author.

programme.title: What's Your Number?
programme.desc: A woman looks back at the past nineteen men she's had relationships with in her life and wonders if one of them might be her one true love.

programme.title: Minotaur
programme.desc: When the villagers offer their brethren as a sacrifice to the Minotaur, Theo (Tom Hardy) sets off on a harrowing quest to the labyrinth to kill the evil bull-god.

programme.title: The Three Burials of Melquiades Estrada
programme.desc: Ranch boss Pete Perkins is determined to keep his promise to his late best friend by making sure he's laid to rest in his hometown in Mexico.
